records.sourceSnippet: roll call vote, the motion carried. Vice Chair Goodman and Regents Arrascada, Brager, Brown, Del Carlo, Fernandez, Goicoechea, and McGrath voted yes. Chair Brooks and Regents Bautista, Boylan, Carvalho, and Downs voted no. The meeting recessed at 2:00 p.m. and reconvened at 2:23 p.m. with all members present.
records.reason: Clearly listed under a voting-member attendance section; official profile match is still pending.
